skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem: The mean of a list of six numbers is what fraction of the sum of the six numbers? Enter your answer as a decimal.
rationale: The correct answer is 1/6 (approximately .1666 or .1667). The mean of a list of six numbers is the sum divided by 6. So mean/sum = 1/6, which is approximately 0.1666 or 0.1667.
